channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: TSLA Stock Bull Run Ahead? Eric Jackson Says Signal That Preceded Tesla's Biggest Runs Has Fired Again
item.description: EMJ Capital's Eric Jackson on Sunday noted that the signal that preceded Tesla Inc.'s bull run of over 190% over 12 months twice has just fired again. Why Is Jackson Bullish On Tesla? Jackson highlighted in his analysis that Tesla CEO Elon Musk's acknowledgment of competition in the humanoid robo...

item.title: Podcast: Stocks Tick Up Ahead of Trump’s Hormuz Deadline
item.description: Tesla shares drop after weak earnings estimates. And Paramount Skydance stock rises after the company secures new equity commitments. 🎧Listen: Katherine Sullivan hosts the WSJ's Minute Briefing podcast.

item.title: Stock Market Today, April 6: Iran Conflict Continues to Dominate Markets
item.description: Tesla tumbled while Micron moved upwards as investors watch the Iran conflict and inflation concerns grow, April 6, 2026.

item.title: Stock Market Today, April 6: Tesla Falls After Q1 Delivery Miss as Analysts Cut Targets
item.description: Tesla fell after a delivery miss led to analyst cuts, with rising inventory weighing on sentiment despite strong sales in key markets.

item.title: Will the SpaceX IPO Be Bad News for Tesla's Stock?
item.description: SpaceX could be a more compelling growth investment for Elon Musk fans to own this year.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Rise Amid Trump's Latest Iran War Comments; Nvidia, Seagate, Tesla Are Key Movers
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: The stock market ended higher Monday following President Trump's latest Iran war comments. Tesla stock skidded.

item.title: Stocks to Watch Recap: Kratos, JBS, Starbucks, Tesla
item.description: ↗️ Strategy (MSTR), Coinbase (COIN): The crypto-related stocks closed up 6.6% and 1.9%, respectively, on the back of gains for bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. ↗️ Starbucks (SBUX): The coffee chain announced late Friday that it had completed a transaction to grow its footprint in China with Bo...

item.title: Analysts Cut Tesla Price Targets As Regulators Shutter Investigation
item.description: A bull and a bear both offered pessimistic views of Tesla stock after the automaker reported its Q1 deliveries, which provided the first look at its business this year. JPMorgan analyst Ryan Brinkman, the bear, cut his forecast for Tesla's earnings to 30 cents a share down from a previous estimat...

item.title: JPMorgan Sticks To Bearish Tesla Call
item.description: Lower EPS view highlights slowing momentum

item.title: Terafab Keynote | Building AI Chips for Earth & Space
item.description: https://youtu.be/Txt3Wodav1o?si=nOyTuxv4CIA\_wdEN submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Skids 3% Amid Delivery Shortfall Concerns, Execution Risks, and JPMorgan’s Bearish Warning
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is down 3% in Monday’s session, sliding from $360.59 to $350 as a fresh wave of bearish catalysts converges on the EV giant. The move extends a painful stretch for shareholders who have watched the stock shed 19.82% year-to-date heading into today. The selling pressure i...

item.title: Tesla South Korea Sales Jump in March
item.description: Price cuts on China-made models helped lift registrations and intensified EV competition in Korea.

item.title: Tesla stock gets hit with shock move from Wall Street analysts
item.description: Tesla price targets ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) have received several cuts over the past few days as Wall Street firms are adjusting their forecast for the company’s stock following a miss in quarterly delivery figures for the first quarter. Despite Tesla not being an automotive company exclusively, the Wal...

item.title: BYD Is Closing In on the U.S., but Tesla Still Holds the Edge
item.description: BYD is building a backdoor into the U.S. that could eventually reshape the global auto market. And while Tesla still controls where it matters most, the Chinese EV maker could pose a serious threat to carmakers.

item.title: JPMorgan reiterates Tesla sell rating, $145 price target
item.description: Analyst Ryan Brinkman cut his 2026 EPS forecast and warned investors to approach Tesla stock with "a high degree of caution"

item.title: Stocks to Watch: Strategy, Tesla, JBS, Paramount
item.description: ↗️ Strategy (MSTR), Coinbase (COIN): The crypto-related stocks jumped on the back of gains for bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. ↗️ JBS (JBS): Shares in the world's largest meatpacker rose 1% after its workers in Colorado agreed to end a three-week strike.

item.title: 358,023 Reasons to Consider Selling Tesla Stock Here
item.description: With Tesla’s Q1 delivery numbers below expectations, should you consider selling the stock now?

item.title: TSLA selloff deepens: Why analysts are slashing Tesla targets after delivery miss
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) declined 2.5% Monday, extending losses after falling 5.4% Friday, as weak first-quarter delivery figures pressured shares.

item.title: Our Tesla Price Target Is $349 but the Risk Reward Cuts Both Ways Right Now
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has shed nearly 20% year-to-date in 2026 and sits roughly 28% below its December 2025 peak. Our model weighs in on whether this is a buying opportunity or a sign of deeper structural problems. 24/7 Wall St.

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Seagate, Micron, Tesla, Kratos, Strategy, Soleno, Viridian, and More
item.description: Seagate Technology stock jumps after Morgan Stanley names the maker of hard disk drives its ‘top pick,’ replacing Western Digital.

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Priced For Perfection But Delivers Disappointment
item.description: Tesla stock finished last week in the red after first-quarter deliveries came in at 358,023 — below the 365,645 analysts had expected. The company finds itself in an awkward position as it looks to transition away from being a traditional electric-vehicle seller toward autonomous driving and robo...

item.title: Tesla: Weak Start To 2026
Bank Warns of Tesla Stock Collapse by 60%
item.description: Tesla Could Fall Over 60%, JPMorgan Says

item.title: Tesla Delivers Breakout Month In South Korea
item.description: Strong demand meets aggressive pricing strategy

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving feature probe closed by NHTSA
item.description: A probe into a popular Tesla self-driving feature has been closed by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) after over a year of scrutiny from the government agency. The NHTSA has officially closed its investigation into Tesla’s Actually Smart Summon (ASS) feature, marking a r...

item.title: Apple’s Record $143 Billion Quarter Exposes Just How Far Tesla Has Fallen
item.description: Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) both reported earnings this year, and the results diverged sharply. Apple delivered a record-breaking quarter built on hardware demand and a growing services flywheel while Tesla reported shrinking revenue, collapsing net income, and a pivot story that ...

item.title: Lucid Faces Biggest Disaster Ever
item.description: If there is one key metric that shows an EV company can survive, it is unit sales growth. Among US manufacturers, the only exception is Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) because of its size and portability. Lucid (NASDAQ: LCID) failed that test, as its first-quarter deliveries and production fell well below e...

item.title: Tesla Might Have a Free Cash Flow Problem, Analyst Says. What It Means for the Stock.
item.description: Tesla stock has dropped for seven consecutive weeks. Investors want to see robo-taxi progress before bidding shares up again.

item.title: Musk’s Net Worth Rises $16 Billion As SpaceX Heads Toward IPO
item.description: Elon Musk’s net worth declined in the early part of 2026 due to Tesla’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) problems. Tesla’s stock dropped from $480 in mid-December to $355 recently. Its market cap today is $1.35 trillion.

item.title: Tesla Q1 Deliveries Expected to Fall Far Short of Peak as EV Demand Cools
item.description: Tesla is settling into a slower EV sales pace as demand cools, tax credits expire, and investor focus shifts to AI, robotics, and the Cybercab.

item.title: Tesla just pulled off an EV shocker no one saw coming
item.description: Tesla(TSLA) is back in business after a brutal few quarters. It's at the top of the global battery-electric vehicle market, and the timing could not be more important. The EV maker said it delivered 358,023 vehicles in the first quarter, ample growth to move past BYD’s 310,389 battery-electric ...

item.title: Tesla uses Model S and X ‘sentimental’ value to enforce massive pricing move
item.description: Tesla is using the “sentimental” value that CEO Elon Musk talked about with the Model S and Model X to enforce one of the most massive pricing moves it has ever applied as it begins to phase out the flagship vehicles. Tesla quietly executed one of its most calculated pricing plays yet. After offi...

item.title: Tesla Q1 Delivery Miss: Is Its AI/AV Bet Enough to Stay Invested?
item.description: TSLA's Q1'26 deliveries fall short of estimates and shares slide. Musk's robotaxi, AI and Optimus bets loom, but monetization is years away.

item.title: JPMorgan warns Tesla stock could sink 60% in new note. Here's why.
item.description: In a new bearish note out from JPMorgan, analysts are warning that Tesla's (TSLA) stock price could lose 60% of its value, illustrating such with a new $145 year-end price target on the EV maker.Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Ines Ferré breaks down the note from the JPMorgan team, while Sevens Rep...

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving History: Where It Stands Today With V12 On HW3 Cars And V14 On HW4 Cars
item.description: My odometer on my 2019 Model 3 now reads 171,696 miles. In the 6 ½ years we have owned the car; we have driven from Utah to Wisconsin round trip 6 times and have driven it coast to coast visiting our daughter in North Carolina and friends in Palm Springs, ... [continued] The post Tesla Full Sel...

item.title: NHTSA closes Tesla Smart Summon probe after 159 incidents
item.description: NHTSA has closed its investigation into Tesla’s “Actually Smart Summon” feature after documenting 159 incidents, all involving minor property damage. The agency found zero injuries and zero fatalities linked to the feature, and determined that Tesla’s six over-the-air software updates adequately ...

item.title: Xiaomi poaches Tesla’s delivery operations manager in Europe ahead of 2027 launch
item.description: Xiaomi has hired Dieter Lorenz, Tesla’s Senior Manager of Delivery Operations for Central Europe, as its new Head of Delivery & Logistics Europe. The move signals that Xiaomi is aggressively building an operations infrastructure on the ground in Europe well ahead of its confirmed 2027 market entr...

item.title: Tesla Snatches Back World’s Top EV Spot After BYD Sales Plummet 25%
item.description: Tesla lost to BYD last year, but the American company is back with a vengeance in 2026.

item.title: Why JPMorgan is warning Tesla stock may crash 60%
item.description: A big warning to Tesla shareholders.

item.title: Tesla Bounces Back After Disappointing Deliveries. This Matters More for the Stock.
item.description: Tesla stock has dropped for seven consecutive weeks. Investors want to see robo-taxi progress before bidding shares up again.

item.title: NHTSA Ends Investigation Into Tesla’s Summon Feature
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration closed its investigation into Tesla’s “Actually Smart Summon” feature due to the low frequency and severity of reported crashes.

item.title: Tesla broadens most-wanted Model Y to eight new markets
item.description: Tesla has broadened the availability of the most-wanted Model Y trim to eight new Asian markets, expanding the footprint of what is one of the most highly requested vehicle configurations in the U.S. Tesla has officially launched ordering for the Model Y L , its long-wheelbase six-seater electric...

item.title: Tesla Stock Keeps Falling - But 10% Lower TSLA Puts Yield 2.0% for One Month Out
item.description: Tesla stock has been falling over the past month. That has pushed up put option premiums. Meanwhile, analyst price targets are significantly higher.

item.title: Is SpaceX the Once‑in‑a‑Generation Investment Everyone Will Wish They Bought?
item.description: This company is going boldly where none have gone before.

item.title: Tesla Shifts From Flagship Models To Japan Growth And Rich Valuation
item.description: Tesla has formally shut down its Model S and Model X production lines, marking an end to its longest running premium models. The company is expanding in Japan, planning more stores and service centers to target leadership among imported brands. These moves come after recent focus on Q1 delivery s...

item.title: Lemonade Expands Renters Reach And Ties Tesla To AI Auto Push
item.description: Lemonade (NYSE:LMND) has launched its renters insurance product in South Carolina, adding another state to its U.S. footprint. The company has also entered into a partnership with Tesla to support its auto insurance offering, highlighting its AI driven approach to underwriting and claims.

item.title: Prediction: Tesla Stock Is a Buy Before 2029 Due to This $10 Trillion Opportunity
item.description: Tesla is chasing its biggest opportunity yet.

item.title: Eyes on AI! Wedbush Keeps $600 Tesla Stock Price Target despite Q1 Miss
item.description: Shares of Tesla (TSLA) dropped 5.42% on Thursday after the EV maker delivered 358,023 vehicles in Q1, missing Wall Street’s estimate of 370,000. Despite the miss, Wedbush’s five-star-rated analyst Dan Ives maintained his Buy rating and $600 price target on TSLA stock, citing AI push and robotaxi ...

item.title: Veteran analyst sends message to Tesla investors after Q1 miss
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) stock just took a body blow after another underwhelming Q1 delivery report, but Dan Ives isn’t flinching. The veteran Wedbush analyst doubled down on his Buy rating for the stock, standing by a $600 price target, even after Tesla missed Wall Street's delivery and energy storage ...

item.title: Tesla Ends Model S, X Production As Elon Musk Calls It 'Ending Of An Era'
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk has said that the automaker has officially ended production of the premium Model S and X lines. The Ending Of An Era In the early hours of Wednesday, Musk marked the occasion via a post on the social media platform X.
